title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Home screen shows limited support message when a newly released but unsupported device is connected with empty LM version info after its launch date.
steps: Launch the app and pair with headset (headset ON and properly connected) -> Connection status icon is a green ring, black "i" icon on top right corner.
Tap the "i" icon -> Pop up displays message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited."
Tap outside the pop up -> Pop up closes.
expected: Home screen shows limited support. Connection status icon is a green ring with a black "i" icon on the top right corner. Tapping the "i" icon shows a pop-up with the message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
